name: Gyrocopter
description: So much for being retired… Aurel, the Gyrocopter.

abilities.name: Afterburner
abilities.description: Both attack damage and spell damage instance sourced to Gyrocopter grants self a movement speed bonus stack per affected enemy hero for a certain duration. Speed Bonus per Stack: 1. Duration: 3.9. Move Speed Bonus per Stack: 1. Creep Speed Factor: 0.5. Duration Increase: 0.1.

abilities.name: Rocket Barrage
abilities.description: Launches a salvo of rockets at nearby enemy units in a radius around the Gyrocopter. Search Radius: 400. Number of Targets: 1. Damage per Rocket: 8/14/20/26 (22/28/34/40). Barrage Duration: 3. Cooldown: 7/6.5/6/5.5. Mana Cost: 85.

abilities.name: Homing Missile
abilities.description: Fires a homing missile to seek the unit-targeted enemy. Dealing damage and stunning when it reaches the target. Enemy units can destroy the missile before it reaches its target. Cast Range: 1050. Hit Count: 3. Damage: 90/180/270/360 (112.5/225/337.5/450). Stun Duration: 1.3/1.7/2.1/2.5 (1.6/2/2.4/2.8). Missile Move Speed: 500. Tower Hit Count: 6. Cooldown: 30/24/18/12. Mana Cost: 120/130/140/150.

abilities.name: Flak Cannon
abilities.description: Attack modifiers only affects the primary attacked target. Vision Bonus: 200. Search Radius: 1250. Number of Attacks: 4/5/6/7 (7/8/9/10). Max Attack Targets: Instant. Attack Factor: 1. Duration: 12. Cooldown: 26/24/22/20. Mana Cost: 50/60/70/80.

abilities.name: Call Down
abilities.description: Call down a series of aerial missile strikes that slow and damage enemy units in a target area. Cast Range: 1000. Missile Effect Radius: 400. Strike Distance: 500. Number of Strikes: 3. Damage: 200/350/500. Move Speed Slow: 50%. Cooldown: 90/75/60. Mana Cost: 150/200/250.
